evals.prompt: I'm done with this feature, create a PR
evals.expected_output: Commits, pushes, and creates a PR with a meaningful description
assertions: A git commit is created with a meaningful commit message
The branch is pushed to origin
A pull request is created using gh pr create
If the current branch is main or master, a new branch is created before committing
The PR description uses bullet points and explains why, not just what

evals.prompt: commit push and open a pull request
evals.expected_output: Full workflow: branch check, commit, push, PR creation
assertions: A git commit is created with a meaningful commit message
The branch is pushed to origin
A pull request is created using gh pr create
If the current branch is main or master, a new branch is created before committing
The PR description uses bullet points and explains why, not just what

evals.expected_output: Recognises as a commit+push+PR request and runs the full workflow
assertions: A git commit is created with a meaningful commit message
The branch is pushed to origin
A pull request is created using gh pr create
If the current branch is main or master, a new branch is created before committing
The PR description uses bullet points and explains why, not just what
